fields.name: lastUpdatedDate
fields.label: Last Updated Date
fields.description: The date the pipeline was last updated. Timezone note: Your timezone (UTC-05:00) will be used instead of the server setting (UTC-04:00).

fields.name: focusAreaPath
fields.label: Focus Area Path
fields.description: Path for the focus areas tags.

fields.name: classes_searchIconType
fields.label: Search Icon Type
fields.description: Choose how the Search icon is provided.

fields.name: searchFontIcon
fields.label: Search Font Icon
fields.description: Font icon name for Search when using an icon font.

fields.name: searchImageIcon
fields.label: Search Image Icon
fields.description: Path to the Search icon asset to display in the utility navigation.

fields.name: classes_sortIconType
fields.label: Sort Icon Type
fields.description: Choose how the Sort icon is provided.

fields.name: sortFontIcon
fields.label: Sort Font Icon
fields.description: Font icon name for Sort when using an icon font.

fields.name: sortImageIcon
fields.label: Sort Image Icon
fields.description: Path to the Sort icon asset to display in the utility navigation.

fields.name: classes_filterIconType
fields.label: Filter Icon Type
fields.description: Choose how the Filter icon is provided.

fields.name: filterFontIcon
fields.label: Filter Font Icon
fields.description: Font icon name for Filter when using an icon font.

fields.name: filterImageIcon
fields.label: Filter Image Icon
fields.description: Path to the Filter icon asset to display in the utility navigation.

fields.name: clearAllLabel
fields.label: 'Clear All' Button Label
fields.description: The text displayed in the 'Clear All' button. Defaults to: 'Clear All'.

fields.name: applyLabel
fields.label: 'Apply' Button Label
fields.description: The text displayed in the apply action button. Defaults to: 'Apply'.

fields.name: analyticsInteractionId
fields.label: Analytics Interaction ID
fields.description: Identifier used for tracking interactions in analytics systems.
